hero.tagline: The 9 kB map library for React.
hero.subtitle: Zero dependencies. No Leaflet, no Mapbox — just tiles, vectors, and full control.

zeroDep.title: Zero Dependencies
zeroDep.description: No Leaflet, no Mapbox. Pure TypeScript — you own every pixel.

bundleSize.title: Tiny Bundle
bundleSize.description: ~9kB gzipped. Ship interactive maps without bloating your app.

tested.title: Thoroughly Tested
tested.description: Comprehensive test suite covering every component and hook.

accessible.title: Accessible
accessible.description: Keyboard navigation, ARIA labels, focus indicators. WCAG 2.1 AA compliant.

tilesMap.title: Interactive Tile Map
tilesMap.description: OpenStreetMap tiles with markers, clusters, popups, and geographic circles. Pan and zoom to explore.

geolocation.title: Geolocation
geolocation.description: Detect the user's position with a pulsing marker. Starts simulated — click the button to use your real location.

theme.title: Theming
theme.description: Customize every component with MapThemeProvider. Pass a theme object and all markers, popups, controls, and focus rings update instantly.

routes.title: Routes
routes.description: Road routing between waypoints powered by OSRM. Explore different routing modes.
routes.clickMarker: Click a marker to calculate route

story.title: Why "Brownie"?
story.text: Brownie was a Shih Tzu who came into this world in our hands and left the same way — too soon, at just a year and a half. He had a heart that was bigger than his small body could hold. This library carries his name because every project should be built with the same joy he brought to everything he explored. Maps help us find our way. Brownie helped us find ours.

cta.title: Add maps in 5 lines of code.
cta.description: Install, compose, ship. BrownieJS works with any React setup.
